title: San Francisco, CA: All You Must Know Before You Go (2026)

Although the city is relatively small geographically, because of the hills, you need to buy a one, three, or seven-day visitor pass at either the airport or any Walgreens. San Francisco is a great city for walking but also has easily manageable public transportation to help you get around. San Francisco is a small city representing every culture available with the ocean to one side and the bay to the other. Greyhound buses to San Francisco are available to/from many U.S. cities, while Megabus is available to/from a few select cities in California. For more info on getting to San Francisco, visit here.
